hooks.command: bash -c 'TK=$(cat ~/.claude/pb-toolkit-path.txt 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$TK" ]; then ROOT=$(cd "$(dirname "$TK")/../../.." && pwd); SCRIPT="$ROOT/packages/claude-plugin/hooks/check-toolkit-update.sh"; if [ -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then bash "$SCRIPT"; fi; fi'

node -e "const f=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(/\.sr[wdumafsjpq]$/i.test(f)){const n=f.split(/[\\/]/).pop(); console.log('\n❌ BLOQUE: Modification directe de '+n+' interdite.'); console.log('  Les outils Edit/Write corrompent l\'encodage PB (BOM, CRLF, tabs).'); console.log('  → Utiliser pb_modify_script(file_path=\"...'+n+'\", old_text=\"...\", new_text=\"...\")'); console.log(''); process.exit(2)}"

bash -c 'PJ="${PB_SOLUTION_PATH:-}"; EXE="${PB_EXE_PATH:-}"; if [ -n "$PJ" ] && [ -n "$EXE" ]; then EXE_DIR=$(dirname "$EXE"); copied=0; for pbd in $(find "$PJ" -name "*.pbd" -not -path "*/pmix/*" -not -path "*/enable/*" 2>/dev/null); do bn=$(basename "$pbd"); if [ ! -f "$EXE_DIR/$bn" ]; then cp "$pbd" "$EXE_DIR/" && copied=$((copied+1)); fi; done; if [ $copied -gt 0 ]; then echo "✓ $copied PBD(s) copies vers $EXE_DIR"; fi; fi'
